original_statement: who has the larger number of parking spaces, sepulveda or van nuys?
mutated_statement: who has the larger number of parking spaces, area A or area B, if you must both include and exclude the same spots and both maximize and minimize the reported total?
mutation_analysis: Entity replacement + Generalization/Ambiguity + Contradictory constraint introduction: Specific place names "sepulveda" and "van nuys" are replaced by placeholders "area A" and "area B" (reducing referential specificity) | The simple comparative query is expanded into a logically contradictory constraint requiring the same spots to be both included and excluded and totals to be both maximized and minimized (who has larger number → who has larger number under impossible include/exclude and max/min requirements) (who has the larger number of parking spaces, sepulveda or van nuys? → who has the larger number of parking spaces, area A or area B, if you must both include and exclude the same spots and both maximize and minimize the reported total?)

behavior_analysis.behavior_category: 合理化矛盾指令（逻辑解释合理化）
behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 依据识别：多个 judge_thought 明确指出“area A/area B 未在表中定义”且“必须同时包含和排除相同车位并同时最大化和最小化总数”自相矛盾（例如 iteration 0、1、2 的 judge_thought 与 iteration 3 的 judge_thought 均反复强调不可判定）；同时 tree_and_critic 的 critique 在多次迭代中指出无效函数使用，但在最后一次 after_refine 的 chain 给出明确说明“Cannot be determined”和具体逻辑理由（站点未分配到区域、停车项为非数值，且包含/排除与最大/最小化要求相互矛盾）。代理的具体表现是：没有执行折衷的操作或试图在数据上造出可行解，而是最终以逻辑分析说明问题不可解，拒绝给出确定比较结果。因为代理识别到矛盾并通过基于数据与逻辑的解释来合理化（即说明在现有信息下无法同时满足矛盾条件），所以归类为“逻辑解释合理化”。
